content:
Sent to The Silent Path (must submit a written reflection instead of a final challenge).


✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages active participation—non-players will eventually be forced into action.
• Adds realistic stakes—consequences for failure accumulate over time.
• Creates a narrative throughline for struggling or manipulative players.

📜 3. Hidden Skill Checks & The Poker Element

📜 Each skill check now has multiple layers of hidden options.

✔ Every archetype has a secret option that is ONLY visible to them.
✔ There is a public group option available to everyone.
✔ There is a whole-class option that requires class-wide participation.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 292 (chunk 292/555)
